title: Pan-Seared Aubergine with Garlic and Herbs
description: A flavorful French-inspired aubergine dish, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of garlic, herbs, and melted cheese creates a rich and satisfying flavor.

ingredients.name: Baby herbs (such as thyme and rosemary)
Grated cheese (such as Comté or Gruyère)

instructions: 2. Cut the aubergine into 1/2-inch thick slices.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, chopped herbs, salt, and pepper.
4. Brush the garlic-herb mixture evenly onto both sides of the aubergine slices.
5. Heat the skillet over medium heat and add the aubergine slices.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the aubergine is tender and lightly browned.
7. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the aubergine is tender and the top is golden brown.
8. Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the grated cheese over the top of the aubergine.
9. Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
10. Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
